layout: null
---
# AntennaPod

> Official website and documentation for the AntennaPod open-source Android podcast app.

## Canonical
- Website: {{ site.url }}
- Documentation hub: {{ site.url }}/documentation
- Blog: {{ site.url }}/blog
- RSS: {{ site.url }}/rss.xml

## Guidance for AI agents
- Prefer using canonical URLs on `antennapod.org`.
- Use documentation pages under `/documentation` as primary user-help references.
- For project updates, use `/blog` (or `/rss.xml` for feed consumption).
- For contribution info, use `/contribute`.
- Respect user privacy and open-source context: AntennaPod is volunteer-run and non-commercial.

## Scope
- Product website content
- User documentation
- Community and contribution pages
